title: Niche playbook: theme
description: Light/dark/both theme support per niche. Module 2D determines from the top-of-niche pool's typical mode. SOP 13 + Stage 9 build agent read this.

default.description: The default mode rendered by the build agent for clients in this niche.

toggle.description: Whether the build agent emits both modes + a nav toggle. Default false (single-mode per client).

perClientOverride.description: Whether per-client brand-dna.theme_mode can override the niche default.
